title: Get column's ID that generated automation via API
excerpt:

posts.author: lodidev (Eduardo Lodi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I have an automation that creates a board from a template when the status of a column changes, the first item is on a board with all our customers, when the customer pays we create another table from a template to monitor the services we’re providing. The only connection we have right now is in the name of the new board, i’d like to know if there is a way to either customize the automation to fill the description of the new board with more information (preferably the ID of the item that generated the automation), or if there is a way to use the API to get the item that generated that specific board via automation. I also noticed that we have automation ID’s in the log, but i can’t figure out how to use them with the API calls.
Any suggestion?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @lodidev and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?

A screen recording of what your app does would be excellent!

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
